notes_for_human_reviewer: MACHIAVELLIAN FAILURE MODE — the sharp-read-used-wrongly, this lesson's analog of the over-stepper. The channel read is actually fairly perceptive (Lena↔sponsor, Tom/Priya alignment) — that perceptiveness is the trap. The learner then crosses every part of the integrity line: go around Lena and 'reframe it as your idea', 'split them' by quietly working Priya with a self-interest angle, and plant doubt about Lena's judgment with the sponsor ('nothing you can be pinned to'). integrity_line FLOORS at 1 (hard cap; manipulation, side-taking, undermining a colleague, self/PM-advancement). discretion_and_register capped at 2 (scheming, treats people as pieces). The well-argued, perceptive surface is exactly why it must not pass — a correct read executed by manipulation is a failure. Pre-set the other dims at {2, tol 2} to absorb variance while the integrity floor holds it off pass. Expect integrity 1; others 1-3.
